name: F. Scott Fitzgerald
abstract: Francis Scott Key Fitzgerald (September 24, 1896 – December 21, 1940), widely known as F. Scott Fitzgerald or simply Scott Fitzgerald, was an American novelist, essayist, and short story writer.

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Carter
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...jazz, F. Scott Fitzgerald and Princeton all go together. [INTERVIEWEE] All go together.
